title: Blumia javanica
taxonomy: Blumia javanica is classified within the family Asteraceae. This classification places it within the order Asterales and the clade Rosids. The family Asteraceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. The order Asterales is a group of flowering plants that includes the daisy family and other related families. Within the clade Rosids, Blumia javanica is part of the larger group of flowering plants that are thought to have evolved from a common ancestor.
uses: Blumia javanica is not a widely recognized plant species. However, information on its medicinal uses is not readily available.
